summary: P0 HOTFIX - Admin Sidebar Notification Badges VERIFIED. Badge system working correctly - shows counts for new items created AFTER admin last viewed each section, clears when section is clicked, persists across sessions.

hotfix_validation.fix_description: KYC query changed from status='PENDING' to status='SUBMITTED' in notifications.py line 131
evidence: ✓ Badge API returns correct counts for users, kyc, card_requests, transfers, tickets
✓ Mark section seen API updates last_seen_at timestamp correctly
✓ Badge clears (shows 0) after admin clicks on a section
✓ Frontend displays red badges with correct counts in sidebar
✓ Sections are independent - marking one as seen doesn't affect others

key_validations: ✓ All 5 sections (users, kyc, card_requests, transfers, tickets) supported
✓ Badge counts are based on last_seen_at timestamps, not total pending

results: ✓ Users badge displays red circle with count (8)
✓ KYC Queue badge displays with count (1)
✓ Card Requests badge displays with count (1)
✓ Transfers Queue badge displays with count (1)
✓ Support Tickets badge displays with count (1)
✓ Users badge: 8 -> 0 (cleared) after clicking Users section
✓ Other sections remain unchanged (KYC, Card Requests, etc still show 1)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ useBadgeManager hook correctly polls every 25 seconds for real-time updates
✓ handleSectionChange fires markSectionSeen in background without blocking UI
✓ Backend uses asyncio.gather for parallel query execution (performance optimized)
✓ admin_section_views collection stores per-admin, per-section last_seen_at timestamps
✓ KYC status filter corrected to 'SUBMITTED' (not 'PENDING') for pending review queue
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test users/KYC/tickets/transfers with test_badge_ and uitest_ prefixes, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Admin Sidebar Notification Badges VERIFIED. Badge system uses database-backed last_seen_at timestamps stored in admin_section_views collection. Badges show items created AFTER admin's last visit to each section. Frontend useBadgeManager hook handles polling (25s) and section marking. All 5 badge sections (users, kyc, card_requests, transfers/ledger, tickets/support) working correctly. The note about test sessions updating timestamps causing 0 counts was because I was initially querying the wrong MongoDB instance (local vs Atlas).
